zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet Maxwell於1410年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾易亞斯特 吉爾布利德時，她的父親Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood37歲，母親Elizabeth Danielstoun32歲。她於1440年與Alan Cathcart在蘇格蘭雷福福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1472年6月25日在蘇格蘭雷福福爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Janet Maxwell于1410年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾易亞斯特 吉爾布利德时，她的父亲Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood37岁，母亲Elizabeth Danielstoun32岁。她于1440年与Alan Cathcart在苏格兰雷福福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1472年6月25日在苏格兰雷福福爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet Maxwell was born in 1410, in East Kilbride, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth Danielstoun, was 32. She married Alan Cathcart in 1440, in Renfrewshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 25 June 1472, in Renfrewshire, Scotland, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Janet Maxwell est née en 1410, à East Kilbride, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Danielstoun, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Alan Cathcart en 1440, à Renfrewshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 juin 1472, à Renfrewshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Janet Maxwell 1410 in East Kilbride, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Danielstoun 32. Sie hat 1440 in Renfrewshire, Scotland Alan Cathcart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Juni 1472 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Renfrewshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Maxwell è nata il nel 1410 nel East Kilbride, Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Danielstoun, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Alan Cathcart nel 1440, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 25 giugno 1472, nel Renfrewshire, Scotland, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Maxwellが1410年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアエアスト キルブリドで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwoodは37歳，母Elizabeth Danielstounは32歳であった。1440年にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアでAlan Cathcartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1472年6月25日にスコットランドレンフリューシュアイアで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Maxwell(이)가 1410년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 이스트 킬브라이드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Danielstoun(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1440년 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 Alan Cathcart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 6월 25일 스컷랜드 렌프레w실르에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Janet Maxwell nasceu em 1410, em East Kilbride, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Danielstoun, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Alan Cathcart em 1440, em Renfrewshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de junho de 1472, em Renfrewshire, Scotland, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet Maxwell родилась в 1410 г. в местности эаст килбрид, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Danielstoun, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alan Cathcart в 1440 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 июня 1472 г. в местности ренфрюшир, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Janet Maxwell nació en 1410, en East Kilbride, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir Robert Maxwell of Calderwood, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Danielstoun, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Alan Cathcart en 1440, en Renfrewshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 25 de junio de 1472, en Renfrewshire, Scotland, a la edad de 62 años.
